text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is real but was published under a different title. Multiple independent sources (PubMed PMID 12766419, and citations in later papers) confirm the actual title is "Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts" by Neal S, Nip AM, Zhang H, Wishart DS, published in J Biomol NMR 2003. The cited title "Shiftx: chemical shift prediction from protein structures" is a slightly informal/variant title not matching the true published title, but the authors and venue are correct.
LINK: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12766419/
FOUND_TITLE: Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts
FOUND_AUTHORS: Stephen Neal, Amy M Nip, Hongwei Zhang, David S Wishart
FOUND_YEAR: 2003
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
